name: DTX Golf Club
about: DTX Golf Club is an indoor golf simulator venue offering a state-of-the-art experience with spacious bays equipped for immersive play. The facility provides a premium indoor environment with precise ball tracking, realistic course play, and a variety of practice modes. Accessible to both casual players and serious competitors, DTX is committed to a community-driven atmosphere where players can connect, compete, and improve. Public hourly bookings are available at $50 per hour, with members enjoying extended hours and additional benefits like gym access and included GXF performance assessments.
why_golfers_like_it: Spacious simulator bays feature AI trainer technology for instant feedback
State-of-the-art simulators provide an immersive golf experience
Clean and safe environment with a friendly, community-driven atmosphere
Flexible booking options with a 12-hour cancellation policy
Membership options include GXF performance assessments and rolling bay hours

food_and_drink.notes: Food must remain at tables; no food allowed inside simulators or near computers.
No alcohol service is mentioned in the provided website content.

simulator_hardware.notes: Website describes simulators with AI trainer technology and precise ball tracking but does not specify hardware brands.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Website content does not specify whether clubs are provided for rental. It is best to assume you must bring your own clubs or contact the venue directly.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food and drinks are permitted but must remain at tables. No food or drinks are allowed inside simulators or near computers.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Website content does not specify the time required to play 18 holes. It mentions bookings end promptly at the scheduled time and unfinished holes may not be completed.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue welcomes players of all skill levels, and the 'leagues' section mentions 'a welcoming community of players of all skill levels.' While not explicitly stated as a family center, its all-inclusive nature suggests it is kid-friendly.
